hero.name: Deekshana C S
hero.headline: I build practical AI systems that create measurable value.
hero.summary: I turn ideas into deployable products by combining machine learning, clear communication, and user-centered execution.

about.shortBio: I am a Computer Science Engineering student in AI and ML who enjoys translating complex data behavior into understandable, deployable AI systems.
about.longBio: My work lives at the intersection of applied intelligence and social impact. I have explored agriculture, healthcare, and sustainability use cases where model reliability and practical usability matter equally. I enjoy building with deep learning, NLP, and cloud-based AI workflows while also speaking publicly about innovation and responsible AI adoption.
about.mission: Build AI that is not only impressive in demos, but resilient and meaningful in the real world.

Integrated research-led thinking into production-minded project builds
